svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="AI工具场景路由" id="toolRoute2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-474" dy="-108" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="460" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="按使用频率：Claude Code > Cursor > OpenCode > Codex" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="540" x="180" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Q" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="要干的活是什么？" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="360" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A_CC" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Claude Code（主力）
整件事端到端：批量重构 /
跑通端到端 / 自主迭代验证" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="40" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A_CUR" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Cursor
中型改动：重构一段逻辑 /
跨文件改命名 / 写完整接口" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="260" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A_OC" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="OpenCode
开源命令行场景 /
需要本地可控时切" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="480" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A_CX" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Codex / Copilot
行内补全 / 样板联想 /
注释驱动小段生成" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="160" x="700" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;" target="A_CC" value="端到端 / 重活"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;" target="A_CUR" value="编辑器内中改动"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;" target="A_OC" value="本地可控"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=10;" target="A_CX" value="行内补全"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="铁律：核心业务逻辑 / 架构设计 不外包给 AI —— 它没有你的业务上下文，"对"只是通用意义上的对" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="780" x="80" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
